item.title: We are now enabling a queue for DeepSeek v4 Pro, expect longer time-to-first-token instead of degrad...
item.description:
We are now enabling a queue for DeepSeek v4 Pro, expect longer time-to-first-token instead of degrading service.
please bear with us 🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏🙏 https://t.co/Ou1X2o65Nt
--- @ollama | ❤️ 2 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 79
item.author: @ollama

item.title: 我的自建 CI 服务，性能总是飘忽不定，最后发现是买的某网红国产 SSD 掉速严重，才买了半年多，读写速度就掉到几十M/s 了，所有打到那台 Mac 上的任务都需要三倍时间。我再去搜 SSD，价格已经...
item.author: @waylybaye

item.title: 良渚 native 宝宝，从小开始享受户外时光。 https://t.co/R09eaM4AHt
item.author: @tualatrix

item.title:

🔹20...
item.description:
🎁 Here's a new limited-time top-up reward. Grab bonus vouchers and keep exploring Kimi K2.6.
🔹20% bonus for $100 – $299
🔹25% bonus for $300 – $999
🔹30% bonus for $1,000+
Ends May 3.
🔗Details:https://t.co/HLRaFecpoN https://t.co/TVo1yL7TQ2
